description__rule: Object in LeanIX to model data exchange between IT Products
Focus on data flow, transfer type, frequency, and IT components
Consumers may create interfaces if not modeled by providers
examples: User creates interface for consumed API
LeanIX EAM GraphQL, LeanIX EAM Collibra
v1 used by Product A, v2 by Product B

key_concept: External systems not modeled as IT Products
examples: External: Zollbehörde REST, External: SCHUFA SOAP

description__rule: Not operated by PAG, subsidiaries, or group brands
Interface created and owned by consuming IT Product
Technical delivery handled by separate IT Product
examples: Porsche Developer Hub implements LeanIX EAM GraphQL

description__rule: Logical interface between systems, technical via platform
examples: CRM to ERP Sync via Integration Hub

description__rule: Not yet available in LeanIX as of July 2025

key_concept: No direct org assignment on interface
description__rule: Responsibilities are derived from the assigned provider IT Product
examples: Interface inherits responsibility from LeanIX as provider

role_in_model: Represents a strategic project or transformation initiative
Represents a system or platform that delivers business or technical capabilities
Represents a data or service exchange point between IT Products
